channel.title: Home Style on Bryce Jech
channel.description: Recent content in Home Style on Bryce Jech

item.title: Green Bean Casserole
item.description: Combine green beans, bacon, alfredo, milk, and butter into a baking dish. Cover and cook for 30 min at 350 deg. Add french onions and cheddar cheese, cook uncovered at 450 deg another 15 minutes.
